---
title: Git Authentication Demo (GitLab)
---

# Git Authentication

This runbook demonstrates the generic `<GitAuth>` block with the GitLab
provider. The same block also supports GitHub — set `provider="github"` (the
default) or let the user pick from the dropdown.

## Step 1: Authenticate to GitLab

<GitAuth
  id="git-auth"
  provider="gitlab"
  hideProviderSelect
  title="Connect to GitLab"
  description="Authenticate to access private GitLab repositories"
/>

## Step 2: Verify Authentication

The verify step references the auth block by `gitAuthId`, so it waits for
authentication and inherits the `GITLAB_TOKEN` from the session environment.

<Command
  id="verify-auth"
  gitAuthId="git-auth"
  title="Verify GitLab Access"
  path="./scripts/verify-auth.sh"
/>
